zh.Bishops Castle, Shropshire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jenkin Oakley於1400年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素時，他的父親William Oakeley40歲，母親Mrs William Oakeley40歲。他於1434年與Joanne Griffith在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1434年在英國英格蘭享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Oakley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of numerous places called Oakley, Oakle, or Oakleigh, in Bedfordshire, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Suffolk, or Wiltshire. The placenames derive from Old English āc ‘oak’ + lēah ‘open woodland’.

nameMeanings.name: Jenkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Jankin. This was a pet form of the boy's name Jan , with the diminutive suffix -kin. The modern given name is popular in Wales, where the surnames Jenkin and Jenkins are common.

en.lifeSummary: When Jenkin Oakley was born in 1400, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Oakeley, was 40 and his mother, Mrs William Oakeley, was 40. He married Joanne Griffith in 1434, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1434, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

Il a épousé Joanne Griffith en 1434, à Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1434, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Jenkin Oakley(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Oakeley(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs William Oakeley(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 Joanne Griffith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.
